root_text.sn19.7:1.1: “Idhāhaṁ, āvuso, gijjhakūṭā pabbatā orohanto addasaṁ usulomaṁ purisaṁ vehāsaṁ gacchantaṁ.
root_text.sn19.7:1.2: Tassa te usū uppatitvā uppatitvā tasseva kāye nipatanti.
root_text.sn19.7:1.4: eso, bhikkhave, satto imasmiṁyeva rājagahe kāraṇiko ahosi …pe….

translation_text.sn19.7:1.1: “Just now, reverend, as I was descending from Vulture’s Peak Mountain I saw a man whose body hairs were arrows flying through the air.
translation_text.sn19.7:1.2: And those arrows kept rising up and falling on his body
translation_text.sn19.7:1.4: “That being used to be a punisher right here in Rājagaha. …”
